Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Stiller & Meara star, showing off their act and joining in the sketch fun. Also: Carol as "Mary Worthless."
Video.title: Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke is Carol's guest, lending his impressive talents to an homage to Shirley Temple films.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and meet a decorator in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Carol welcomes Vincent Price and Joan Rivers!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joan Rivers, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Carol's guests tonight are Garry Moore and Durward Kirby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: It's time to say "so long" as Carol closes the book on one of the greatest shows in television history.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Nanette Fabray guest on the season finale, featuring an installment of "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: As The Oldest Conductor, Tim Conway leads the Sydney Orchestra.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Image.alt: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Video.summary: Guest William Conrad appears in "The Family" sketch. Also: Harvey's news for his wife gives her twitches.
Video.title: William Conrad

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Guest Steve Lawrence appears in a WWII spoof, and Carol sings "You Light Up My Life" while bathing Tim.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Betty White joins in the latest installment of "The Family" wherein Mama has decided to clean up her attic.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Ruth Buzzi guest, with Buzzi as Chris' friend in "Carol & Sis", and Tim and Carol as survivors.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ruth Buzzi

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Guest stars Steve Lawrence & Sally Struthers join in "Late, Late Movie" spoofs. Also: "The Boring Twenties."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Sally Struthers

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Guests Tom Conway and Ken Berry visit Canoga Falls in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a tribute to Vaudeville.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Mel Torme guest star! Martha appears in "The Sunday Painters". Mel and Martha join parodies.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Joan Rivers kills with her comedy set, while The Old Folks and the 10th Avenue Family appear in sketches.
Video.title: Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Comedian Alan King guest stars as Carol's distracted psychiatrist.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show
